title: SQL to MAL listing looses types
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE author (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, name TEXT NOT NULL, birthdate DATE);
CREATE TABLE book (id INTEGER, title TEXT, author_id INTEGER, FOREIGN KEY (author_id) REFERENCES author(id));
INSERT INTO author (name, birthdate) VALUES ('John Doe', '1980-01-01');
INSERT INTO book (id, title, author_id) VALUES (1, 'Sample Book', 1);
SELECT b.title, a.name FROM book b JOIN author a ON b.author_id = a.id WHERE a.birthdate IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: SQL to MAL listing type loss during table creation
